description: Write the generated Nextflow params YAML (input: <samplesheet>, outdir: <outdir>, and exactly one of fasta:/genome:) for reproducible reruns of nf-core/pacsomatic.
rules: read-only — writes the params YAML only, never executes the pipeline
exactly one reference mode: provide FASTA or GENOME (FASTA takes precedence if both set)
input line points at the samplesheet path; outdir line points at the run output dir
usage: Set OUTDIR, SAMPLESHEET, and one of FASTA or GENOME. Output: pacsomatic.params.generated.yaml.
limitation: Emits only input/outdir/fasta|genome keys; richer pipeline params should be supplied via a separate -params-file at run time.
